selectCompanyToViewProjects: Select a company to view projects.
primaryCodebaseWorkspace: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
configureWorkspaceDescription: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
localGitCheckoutDescription: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
localNonGitPathDescription: A local folder without git semantics.
remoteGitRepoDescription: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
remoteManagedWorkspaceDescription: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.
setupCommandHint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
cleanupCommandHint: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
runtimeServicesJsonHint: Default runtime services for this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they set an override. If you do not know the commands yet, ask your CEO to configure them for you.
sharedServicesDescription: Shared services for this project workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
noRuntimeServicesRunning: No runtime services are currently running for this workspace.
noRuntimeServiceConfigured: No runtime-service default is configured for this workspace yet.
workspaceNotFound: Workspace not found for this project.
runtimeConfigJsonMustBeObject: Runtime services JSON must be a JSON object.
remoteManagedRequiresRef: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
workspaceRequiresPathOrUrl: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
localPathMustBeAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
repoUrlMustBeValid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
configureExecutionWorkspaceDescription: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow. These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
provisionCommandHint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
runtimeConfigOverride: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
runtimeConfigInherited: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
runtimeConfigNone: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
runtimeServicesJsonExecutionHint: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override. If you are missing the right commands, ask your CEO to set them up for you.
noRuntimeServicesRunningExecution: No runtime services are currently running for this execution workspace.
noRuntimeConfigDefined: No runtime config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
noWorkspaceOperationsRecorded: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
issuesUsingThisWorkspaceDescription: Any issue attached to this execution workspace appears here so you can review the full session context before reusing or closing it.
noIssuesLinked: No issues are currently linked to this execution workspace.
workspaceRuntimeJsonMustBeObject: Workspace runtime JSON must be a JSON object.
routinesDescription: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
defineRecurringWork: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
keepPolicyControlsSecondary: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
afterCreationTriggerSetup: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.
noRoutinesYet: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
selectCompanyToViewRoutines: Select a company to view routines.
name: Name
routineCreatedBody: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routineCouldNotUpdate: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routineCouldNotStart: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
routineCouldNotSave: Paperclip could not save the routine.
saveThisNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
label: Label
triggerCouldNotCreate: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
triggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
triggerCouldNotUpdate: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
triggerCouldNotDelete: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
webhookSecretCouldNotRotate: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
runTranscriptFixturesDescription: Built from a real Paperclip development run, then sanitized so no secrets, local paths, or environment details survive into the fixture.
runDetailDescription: The long-form run page with the `Nice | Raw` toggle and the most inspectable transcript view.
issueWidgetDescription: The issue-detail live run widget, optimized for following an active run without leaving the task page.
dashboardCardDescription: The active-agents dashboard card, tuned for compact scanning while keeping the same transcript language.
compactLiveTranscript: Compact live transcript stream for the issue detail page.
